# kSecTrustRevocationValidUntilDate

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the earliest date at which revocation information becomes stale.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecTrustRevocationValidUntilDate: CFString
```

## Discussion

This key is only present if the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecTrustRevocationChecked] key has a value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue]. The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDate] representing the earliest date at which the revocation information for one of the certificates in this chain might change.
title: kSecTrustRevocationValidUntilDate
